description:
Grab-bag of small dead-code items, each independently trivial.

- src/lexer.rs — verify Tok::Dot is never constructed (grep), delete the variant.
- src/repl.rs — delete load_items (superseded by load_items_filtered per .20.3 macro_def_spans work).
- src/test_runner.rs — add #[cfg(test)] to run_str. It is referenced only from src/test_runner.rs's own #[cfg(test)] mod tests block.
- src/ir_codegen.rs:615 — drop unused imports Tag, Endian.
- src/ir_codegen.rs:102 — remove unnecessary unsafe block: `let frame = unsafe { fz_alloc_frame(...) }`. The fn is safe; the wrap is redundant.

## Deliverable

- -6 warnings.
- One commit. The items are small enough to bundle.
title: Sweeps: Tok::Dot, repl::load_items, run_str cfg(test), unused imports/unsafe
